original_abstract: The dissemination of this publication by the University of Łódź Press was made possible through funding from the "Scientific Excellence as a Key to Excellence in Education" project. This initiative is supported by the European Social Fund under the Knowledge Education Development Operational Program (Grant No. POWER.03.05.00-00-Z092/17-00).
humanized_abstract: The University of Łódź Press has published this collection as part of the activities related to the "Scientific Excellence as a Key to Excellence in Education" project. The project was financed with the support of the European Social Fund as part of the Knowledge Education Development Operational Program ( Grant No. POWER.03.05.00-00-Z092/17-00).
